entry.title: Pack existing HU into another existing HU both assigned to Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I have this requirement to pack an existing HU into another HU through abap code.

My scenario:

I have 2 HUs, one of them has a material assigned and the other one is just an empty HU.

I need to pack the first one and it's content into the second one.

Im trying to achieve this this way:

1- In a Z program I create the new empty HU.

2- Assign it to the Outbout Delivery

3- Once assigned, I use the BAPI_HU_PACK to pack the first one (with the material) into the second one (empty) so I can have 3 levels -> Top Hu (ump), Second HU (ump working as a box) and it's material.

When I execute the BAPI_HU_PACK I get this error HUFUNCTIONS 261 'Processing of HUs for selected objects not possible'

I think it's because once the HU is assigned to the Outbound Delivery you cant 'repack' it into another HU but if you do so manually, there's no problem.

Any idea?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content: Hi Erik,

entry.title: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content:
I am frequently running into the following problems in terms of usability with Datasphere:

1) Slowness of the interface

The workflow Save -> Data preview -> implement -> jump to Data Builder is slow to the point where I find myself looking to do other things between clicks. I know it is Cloud but it is slow compared to other cloud products too. And there is a big difference between a 2 second wait or a 5+ second wait between clicks.

2) Different state of views / problematic caching

It happens constantly that a change in an underlying view / table is not reflected in views / models on top. I find myself constantly reloading the tab, reimplementing or even closing the tab and reopening it. I find myself second guessing if I made a mistake after all until after the third reload or so, the change is finally there. This eats up a lot of time. And you simply do not know if the current view you are working in has up to date info from underlying view or not.

3) Things like sorting and filtering and level of navigation are not remembered.

I always want to filter by last change. I always want to hide shared objects. But I always have to change those settings. When I'm working in a folder, I want to stay in that folder but I am always dropped back to the root folder. These are just a few examples where I have to redo the same settings over and over.

4) Poor error messages

Error messages are essential for finding mistakes but often times Datasphere error messages are cryptic or even misleading. 

All of these issues combined cause an immense slowdown in my workflow that stands in the way to really make Datasphere shine for me. I personally would advice the management to prioritise usability features as they are needed. 

Am I alone here or do others experience the same issues?

entry.title: Re: TGM-17104 Goal Status Trigger Completion Setting?
entry.content: I came here to find the answer as well. Statuses like In Progress, Behind should show on the homepage with the Mark As Complete button. Statuses like Cancelled and Postponed should not show on the homepage as "Mark as Complete" There needs to be an extra layer of rules where you can pick which ones trigger an overdue on the homepage, and which ones dont.

entry.title: Re: select where condition
entry.content:
Hello @Madhusudhan_MV 

Here the select statement you can use:

SELECT * FROM /scwm/huhdr INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_tab)
  WHERE lgnum = @pa_lgnum
  AND hu_guid_ext <> /scwm/huhdr~guid_hu_top.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Publication of SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 and more...
entry.content:
We successfully launched content updates for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in EARL this week. These are now readily available to our customer channels Digital Discovery Assessment, Cloud ALM, and Process Navigator. Besides, the process updates for the following have also been deployed:

  • SAP Best Practices for SAP Marketing Cloud 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for public sector 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023

With the new Process Navigator version, we also provide new additional filters to find all Two-Tier related solution processes. 

Figure 1: Filter for Two-Tier ERP to find the respective solution processes.

In conjunction with content updates, we introduced again several new features to Process Navigator on SAP for Me, based on feedback from our customers, partners, and internal users.

Following new features are available: 

  • Enable comparison for solution scenarios and for processes of different release versions or different localizations 
  • Show applications and application roles for solution activities in solution process flow diagrams 
  • Enable mass assets download for selected solution processes 
  • Show the total number of solution processes, new solution processes, and number of solution processes flow diagrams for a solution scenario 
  • Filter solution processes by application, application roles, solution capabilities and solution components on global search page 

Figure 2: Compare functionality on solution scenario level with other country/region or other version.

By using the comparison function to compare two release versions, you can easily identify the changes that have been made. The changes are displayed in color and provide a great opportunity for side-by-side comparison in the split view.

Figure 3: Compare result page in a side-by-side view pointing out all changes.

In addition to the current filters for solution scenario version and country/region, new filtering options have been introduced. Users can now apply filters for application, application role, and capability as well. 

Figure 4: Filter for application, application role and capability.

Furthermore, we provide new personalization features in Process Navigator:

  • Enable tile sequence personalization on the homepage
  • Enable tab sequence personalization on the scenario and process detail page
  • Preferred country/region as the default filter for global search results
  • Notification about new features

Figure 5: Personalization options on the page, and the user default settings.

The personalization feature lets users customize the Process Navigator view according to their own needs, considering each user's distinct characteristics and behaviors. Keep an eye out for upcoming updates on personalization and continuous enhancements to usability. 

In the last quarter, the Process Navigator saw over 4,000,000 visits indicating a high demand for SAP Best Practices. This motivates our team to keep improving the tool, adding valuable information, and prioritizing user-friendliness. 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment in our Feedback Service tool or ask your questions and engage with the experts.

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Hello Eva_Hett , 

Thank you for the warm welcome! I’m excited to start the "Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite" course on August 28, 2024. The topics covered, including AI-driven integration, ISA-M methodology, and real-time insights with event-driven architectures, are incredibly relevant and intriguing.

I look forward to engaging in the Course Discussion Group and exchanging ideas with fellow learners. I'm eager to deepen my understanding and apply these insights to enhance our integration strategies.

Thanks again for this opportunity, and I’m excited to get started!

Best regards,
Azmath.

entry.title: Re: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM

entry.title: Customizing Your Form Template With Custom FormCalc/JS Code(using Abode LifeCycle) in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Previously, the tutorial of customizing output form template using Adobe LifceCycle are mainly focused on tasks like adding custom fields, changing company logo, changing address layout. I strongly recommend to read this very nicely blog which showing everything step by step to customize output form template. While Adobe Forms also support programming to add logic for data source processing, this blog would like to give a short glimpse on how to write FormCalc code to change the behavior of your Form Template.

This blog would split into 2 parts where the first part would introduce the composition of Abode LifeCycle and how to use the code editor. The second part would introduce the syntax of FormCalc with a customizing example. In the following phase, the term “Designer” would refer to Adobe LifeCycle Designer.

 1.Designer in the SAP environment.                                          

 

  • A. Layout Editor

    The Layout Editor is the main area where you create and maintain the form design. It contains four tabs: "Design View", "Master Page", "XML Source", "Preview Tab".

    "Design View" tab Displays the pages that make up the form design. The pages in Design View contain a form design’s content. In #S/4HANA Cloud Output, we don't need to create any new form template cause we have the pre-delivered output template. What you need to do is just to adjust the template. Secondly, "Master Pages" tab displays the master pages that can be applied to pages in Design View. Master pages specify the layout and the background for the form design. You add objects that will occur in the same position throughout the form design on a master page. The Master Pages tab is hidden by default. Objects in the Design View page do not appear in the master page. "XML Source" tab displays the XML source code that describes the structure of the form design and its objects. It is recommended that you do not edit the XML source code directly. Preview PDF tab Displays a PDF form based on the current form design. As you work, if you have Acrobat or Adobe Reader installed, you can preview the form in the Preview PDF tab. Use the Preview PDF tab to view and test the operation of a form or template as if it were a PDF file. You can set options for previewing interactive forms or printable forms in PDF by using the Form Properties dialog box (Preview tab).                                                                     

  • B. Script Editor           

 In the Script Editor, you can create, edit, and review calculations and scripts specific to a form. This tool allows you to develop anything from basic calculations that sum numeric fields to intricate scripts that dynamically adjust the form's layout based on user interactions. Designer provides support for scripting in its proprietary language, FormCalc, as well as in JavaScript, offering flexibility to cater to different scripting requirements.

  • C. Palette                                                                                                                                                     

The palettes offer convenient access to tools without cluttering your workspace. They can consist of multiple tabs, each housing common properties. For instance, the Object palette may feature several tabs. You have the flexibility to organize the palettes within the workspace to align with your preferred working style. Among the most frequently utilized palettes are the Hierarchy palette and Data View palette.

The Hierarchy palette visually represents the contents found in the Design View and Master Pages tabs. Selecting an item in the Hierarchy palette also highlights it in the associated body or master page.

Regarding the Data View palette, when a data connection is present, it showcases the hierarchy derived from that connection. The top nodes in this hierarchy represent individual data connections by displaying their names. Data connections establish a link between the form and the data source. When designing a form based on a data connection, Designer constructs a data structure for the form using the provided data source. Users can filter nodes for manipulation and efficiently create a form using selected or all data sources. Subsequently, binding is utilized to connect a node from the data source to an object on the form

2. Customizing Example

Requirement: You are an SAP implementation consultant for a consulting services company. The consulting services company has a long-term contract with their customer and has created a continuous multi-year Service Sales Order in the SAP system. Every year-end, one single item was added to the sales order. Due to business specifics, the consulting company wants to send only the Order Confirmation Change for the last item added that year which means to only print the last item in the PDF output.

Implementation Steps:

Find the code editor area.

When first received this requirement, the most important point is to find out the working mechanism for Adobe Designer. In a nutshell, the goal is to display the data source in a formatted manner. We can write logic to customizing how data was shown. In the script editor, Designer offers various trigger points for the script, such as 'initialize,' 'enter,' 'exit,' and so on. If the form connected to a data source, we can manipulate the data directly.

Click on the Hierarchy palette, select the node "tabInnerTable" located at the following path: Form -> bdyMain -> frmTableBlock -> tblRemarkRowTable -> rowItem -> tabInnerTable.

 

Then open the Script Editor(click Window tab and choose Script Editor) for the chosen node. Choose the dropdown list with “calculate*”. Add the below code to control that only show the last item:

 

 

var tblrow = frmTableBlock.tblRemarkRowTable.resolveNodes("rowItem[*]").length - 1;

if ( $.parent.parent.rowItem[tblrow].tblInnerTable.rowItem.colItem.rawValue <> $.rowItem.colItem.rawValue )

     then

       $.presence = "inactive"

endif;

 

 

When calculate the each row item's value: Get the last row's index in the data source table(rowItem) first. Then compare the value in current row with the value in the last item through the gotten last item's index. If they are different which means current row item are not the last item, set the presence of current row as inactive. With this code, only the last item will be shown in the PDF.

Thanks for reading this blog…

  • Hope this blog will be useful. If you enjoyed this blog post please give it a like! If you have questions, feel free to comment.
  • This article is an example of customizing a form template using a script, with the hope that it can help everyone understand how to customize their own forms in a more diverse and effective way to achieve additional functionalities.

Additional Note.

Please check community tag(Link) for other knowledges about S/4HANA Cloud for Sales. You can also post and answer questions here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer - BOMs with History with effectivity parameter
entry.content:
Dear community,

We're currently migration BOMs from ECC to S/4 HANA and we're facing the following challenge for lots of BOMs. The method CNV_PE_S4_PP_MATERIAL_BOM_ECN doesn't consider changes in positions with ECN numbers with effectivity parameters. These positions are migrated but as new positions instead of as modifications of the same position.

In the source system

In the target system.

entry.title: Delivery already contained in shipment, deletion of the outbound delivery impossible
entry.content:
Dear all,

The process is following:

First we delete the freight order: FO 6100022255 duly canceled.

After that we can see in our document flow of the outbound delivery that the freight order disappears:

But if we now want delete the delivery an error message is visible:

Delivery already contained in a shipment

Cancelling is impossible

 

After saving the delivery = automatic creation of a new Freight order = 6100022305

 

How is it possible to solve this problem? We want delete the delivery. But if we delete the freight order and afterwards we save the outbound delivery, suddenly a new freight is created.

Very best regards

You might want to re-read the requirements 😉

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
Thanks always for diving in to help, @geek , it is very much appreciated! 

Just for info to everyone, while the task is northbreeze-productInfo it will get lowercased anyway before the TESTER module for the given task is loaded. So it was a great observation, but won't affect the outcome.

entry.title: Handling unit in EWM - Configuration EWM
entry.content:
Intro:

Handling units will be used in a warehouse. Let us see how to configure the same in the SAP system.

Handling units are the materials that are used to pack the product. It can either be a carton, Pallet, or Plastic wrapper. The boxes and pallets will have the number for identifying them. So this needs to be created in SAP to track it.

Main part: - Overview:

1. Configuration 2. Master data 3. Transaction data

1. Configuration:

Create a Number Range for HU

Logistics General - Handling Unit Management - Basics - Technical Basics - Define Number Ranges for Handling Units

Packaging Material Types in ECC

To identify the packing materials in SAP this needs to be maintained

SIMG - Logistics General - Handling Unit Management - Basics - Define Packaging Material Types for Shipping

Material Group for Packaging Materials in ECC

 This will be used to group the packing material types together.

SIMG - Logistics General - Handling Unit Management - Basics - Define Material Group for Packaging Materials

Define Allowed Packaging Materials in ECC

This is a table which maps the packing material types to the packing groups.

SIMG - Logistics General - Handling Unit Management - Basics - Define Allowed Packaging Materials

Packaging Material in EWM

The packing material types also need to be configured in EWM nodes.

Note: This needs to be same as the ECC packing materials. If differs the HU will not be created in EWM.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Cross-Process Settings - Handling Units - Basics - Define Packaging Material Types for Warehousing

Packing Group in EWM

The packing group which we have created in ERP will already be there. Here we just need to map the EWM packing materials to ERP packing group

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Cross-Process Settings - Handling Units - Basics - Maintain Allowed Packaging Material Types for Packing Group

Assign number range in EWM

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Cross-Process Settings - Handling Units - External Identification - Assign Number Range Intervals to Packaging Material Types

Define Handling Unit Type in Integration node

This one is HU type at client level. Its used to denote the types of handling units.

Integration with Other SAP Components - Extended Warehouse Management - Additional Material Attributes - Attribute Values for Additional Material Master Fields - Define Handling Unit Type

Define HU Type Groups in EWM

This is a description which you can use it to group HU types.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Cross-Process Settings - Handling Units - Basics - Define HU Type Groups

Assign HU Type Group in EWM

Here you can map the HU type to HU group.

SCM Extended Warehouse Management - Extended Warehouse Management - Cross-Process Settings - Handling Units - Basics - Define HU Types for Each Warehouse Number and Assign HU Type Group

Master data:

Now create the pallet as materials master with packing material type VERP in mm01. Also maintain the Material group 0075 from ERP and type as PALL.

In WM packing view maintain the HU type PALH which we created in EWM.

Also I have created the carton and cover with respective HU types in MM01. Then create these packing materials in EWM via /n/SCWM/MAT1. Nothing to change here.

Transactional data:

Create a PO with a EWM material and EWM storage location with Confirmation control in ME21N.

Then create one inbound delivery document in VL31N. In next screen select the product and click pack button on top near to logs button. (8th from left)

In next screen pack the material in the packing material which you have created newly. 1st maintain the packing material in top window and click enter. Then select the line items in both windows and click pack button. At last click save.

Now the inbound delivery will be transferred to EWM. If not please check SMQ2.

GR for IBD in EWM.

Go to /n/scwm/prdi and put the inbound delivery which you created in ECC. Then go to HU view. There you can see the two HU which you got created via ECC IBD.

Here you can select the line items and click goods receipt. So that the process will be completed.

Conclusion:

Hope this will support you on understanding the HU is warehouse process.

Also have a look in to Blog . Comments pls if any issues here.

entry.title: Re: select where condition
entry.content: Thanks Dominik

entry.title: Re: difference between logical spool server and alternative printer

entry.title: Re: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content: You are not alone. It gets better over time. If you had been there at the beginning, you would appreciate the current state more 😁

entry.title: Re: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
Hi,

Answer to your query of adjusting the difference between estimated and actual landed cost expense head: - 

Create a GRIR - CHA Charges In Liability Drawer Same As GRNI GL

Map this to landed cost set up. In landed cost JE this GL will get credited. When you book the broker invoice of type service against landed cost above GL will get debited.

In case of difference, you can set this difference through GL reconciliation via a manual JE by selecting the GL of your choice.

Hope this will help you.

entry.title: Intermittent Dashboard Functionality Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community  Team

I am writing to report an issue we are experiencing with our dashboard. we have encountered intermittent functionality problems under the following conditions:

Our dashboard is experiencing intermittent functionality issues. Specifically, the dashboard fails to display information in numerical form (Tooltip) when hovering the cursor over it. This issue temporarily resolves after locking and unlocking the screen, but it reoccurs after some time. We need a thorough investigation and a permanent fix for this inconsistent behaviour. I have attached a screenshot  demonstrating this behaviour for your reference.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: WTax Non-Subject Amount in Invoice Sap Business One
entry.content: There is a field called WTax Liable. I searched for the fields mentioned by you. Could not locate.

entry.title: The ‘Ahhh… Access’ Moment: How a Simple Connection Changed My Interview Fate
entry.content:
It was a sunny afternoon, and I sat across from the technical manager, nerves tingling. The job interview had been intense—questions about my experience, technical prowess, and problem-solving abilities. But sometimes, it’s the unexpected moments that leave a lasting mark.

As the manager described their vision for a new application—Microsoft Visual BASIC and Access—I listened intently. The room buzzed with excitement. Finally, there was a pause, and my instincts kicked in.

“Ahhh… Access,” I said, almost involuntarily.

The manager’s eyes widened. “You know Access?” he asked, enthusiasm bubbling.

And just like that, the tide turned. Suddenly, I was the candidate they sought—the one who understood Access intricacies. The interview shifted from grilling to camaraderie.

In the end, it wasn’t a complex algorithm or a dazzling code snippet that sealed the deal. It was a shared moment, a connection forged over a database tool.

Years later, my friends still chuckle when I recount the “Ahhh… Access” story. It reminds me that interviews aren’t just about skills; they’re about being present, authentic, and open to unexpected bridges.

So, here’s to the power of a simple phrase—a bridge that led to a job offer and a memorable tale.

entry.title: Reassigning Same Curricula within Expiry Period to Users
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this post finds you well. I am seeking guidance on reassigning the same curricula to users within the expiry period.

Scenario:

We have assigned a curricula to a group of users, and now we need to reassign the same curricula to the same users within the expiry period. The curricula has not changed, but we need to update the assignment to reflect the current dates.

Question:

Is it possible to reassign the same curricula to the same users within the expiry period without creating a new assignment or version of the curricula? If so, what are the steps to follow?

Any guidance or advice would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
I can confirm: there _are_ a lot of people with big brains in the CAP team 🙂

On "kudos", that's right. Unfortunately (and much to the annoyance of my pedantic side (of which I'm very proud)), "kudo" (no "s") is not a word, Kudos is a mass noun and cannot be subdivided, i.e. the "s" doesn't denote plural, and by inference any lack of "s" doesn't denote singular, and it makes me sad every time I see it 🙂

entry.title: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content:
Hello,

          I am new to CPI, I was trying to test "Request Reply" step. It is throwing an error in "Processing" when I try to add "Step 2" I get an error "Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema." .

I don't have those many steps as in the below screen shot, I am trying to connect to Northwind using the ODATA adapter. I have filled in all mandatory details, I don't understand why it keeps giving me that error and what information is missing.

entry.title: Costs not getting updated in PPM item financials
entry.content:
Dear experts need your help.

We have scenario PPM item -->PPM project-->PS project.

All object linking settings are completed and we can see costs getting reflected at accounting tab of ppm project.

However issue is when we are trying rpm fin02 or int planning program to roll up costs to item then costs are not showing up on item fin views.

We observed below 

1. Program output shows no link exists message for ppm item project management 

2. Ps project is not automatically assigned in object links

Later once we manually assigns ps project in object links and execute program costs reflect on item fin views correctly.

We are on S4 2021version.

Please suggest how we can automatically assign ps project in above scenario or any additional settings required in global fields or something

entry.title: Convite Especial para o 15º SAP Inside Track São Paulo #SITSP2024
entry.content:
Olá, amigos e amigas!

É com alegria que anunciamos que amanhã, sábado, dia 27 de julho, acontece o nosso tão aguardado 15º SAP Inside Track São Paulo! Após meses de planejamento e expectativas, estamos prontos para receber você em um novo local, atendendo aos pedidos da nossa comunidade por um espaço maior.

Agradecemos imensamente à SAP Brasil por todo o suporte e incentivo ao longo dos anos, sempre oferecendo estrutura, patrocínio e conhecimento para nossa comunidade. Este ano, temos a honra de contar com a Universidade PUC São Paulo como nossa nova anfitriã, recebendo quase 300 participantes confirmados.

Lembramos que as inscrições pagas serão doadas para instituições carentes. Isso foi graças ao apoio de todos os envolvidos, desde organizadores, participantes, palestrantes e patrocinadores. A sua participação contribui para uma boa causa e faz parte desta grande ação solidária!

Estamos ansiosos para compartilhar momentos incríveis com vocês. Prepare-se para um dia repleto de conhecimento, networking e colaboração!

➤ Como fazer para acompanhar tudo?

Sigam aqui os links:

Transmissão ao vivo pelo youtube:

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLavVF5azjc7lW4qloFXvugDvVHPhLvVwj

Interação em tempo real pelo linkedin pelas contas:

SIT Brasil

https://www.linkedin.com/in/sitbrazil/

SIT São Paulo

https://www.linkedin.com/in/sap-inside-track-s%C3%A3o-paulo-a43b99305/

Hashtag #SITSP2024

https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=sitsp2024

➤ Também não deixe de seguir o grupo oficial da Comunidade SAP em São Paulo

https://community.sap.com/t5/s%C3%A3o-paulo/gh-p/saopaulo

Abraço a todos e tenham um grande dia em Comunidade!

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Awesome, well spotted. Mea culpa. Corrected (function -> action). Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Thanks, yes, sorry for the confusion. Definitely should be an action. Corrected.

entry.title: Re: In table PA_VLE_ENROLL_SEAT there is a field ATTENDANCE_DURATION. need to know the measure of it
entry.content:
Hello,

The data is stored in seconds.

Regards,
Chris

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Lovely! You say all the right things to pique my interest! Would love to see some example from you here!

In wanting to generate some sample tests to use in the TESTER module for this, I generated stuff with jq, "because jq". And you wouldn't believe how lovely this was - it just flowed from my keyboard, and was instantly beautiful. Not because of my coding prowess, but because of how jq has been designed. See the `getid` function here:

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Nice work, and sorry about the confusion. 

You ask a good question - I'm not sure how this might work (altho I have a small brain) because we have to know the number of products in order to calculate the index, via the modulo of that number before diving in with that calculated index. That said, I'd love to hear from others who have other ideas!

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content: Thank you Database up gradation is complete

entry.title: Re: GRC BRM: Restrictions on role content approver from a...
entry.content:
Hi Hasan! Thanks so much for the reply. Apologies I am slow to reply back, as I was exploring my options.

Unfortunately we cannot use the auth object as a restriction because our Team Lead will need the ability to configure and change all roles.

I explored some options and we are going to handle this via workflow. I talked to our workflow person and he is going to put an exclusion on the role approval dialog step that will basically do a check at the point of submitting the role changes for approval to ensure that the person who initiated the approval request will not receive the email or work item in their Inbox to approve. It is a very easy fix thankfully and in our case it is simple from the sounds of it.

Thanks again,

Cindy

entry.title: Re: São Paulo - SAP Stammtisch 8.8.2024 18:00 BRT #sapcodejamslatam
entry.content: Cool event in São Paulo! Too bad I can’t make it this time, but hopefully next time it’ll work out. Enjoy!

entry.title: Question on Just Ask
entry.content:
Hi All,

We were testing Just Ask in a small dataset and had few questions. It was able to answer questions line

What is the sales value for 2023 or What is the sales value by year?

However the moment we add complexities to the question like

What is the sales for for 2023 for APAC or What is sales for by product for 2023 it started giving weird answers.

Wanted to check if anyone noticed similar issues, is it indexation issue??

regards

Vish

entry.title: Customer Material Number not available in fields catalogue of pricing
entry.content:
Hello,
my customer would like to determine the pricing using the "customer material number" and not the "customer material".  Going trough the fields catalogue the "customer material number" is not available, so I cannot fulfil, so far, the customer requirement.

My customer is an automotive one, they are not used to work with internal part number but only with external part number, so it is really needed have this field available.

Please let me know how fix this requirement.

Best
S

entry.title: Re: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC replacement in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content: @Darius

entry.title: Re: BZSTDOC its growing insanely
entry.content: Dear experts, are there any news on this meanwhile? My BZSTDOC also grew to 5 GB and I took all measurements with GC and Log Delete and Purge tool etc., but I'm not getting the DB reduced. If I remove it's records, B1if stops working. Any advise much appreciated. Thanks, David

entry.title: Re: In table PA_VLE_ENROLL_SEAT there is a field ATTENDANCE_DURATION. need to know the measure of it
entry.content: It is a based on seconds in both the pa_vle_event & PA_VLE_ENROLL_SEAT, but the EVENT_DURATION is by hour (ie 1.0 = 1 hour, 1.1 = 1 hour 6 mins, etc.)

entry.title: Re: BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC replacement in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content: @Darius_Nowak Can you answer the follow-up question?

Viswanath

entry.title: Common issues and resolutions for Power Apps
entry.content:
Introduction
Power Apps, part of the Microsoft Power Platform, empowers businesses to produce custom operations without expansive coding. While Power Apps simplifies the app development process, developers frequently encounter common challenges that may hamper their progress. This blog will explore these issues and give practical judgments to ensure a smoother Power Apps experience.
Connectivity Issues:
One of the most common problems druggies face is connectivity issues when trying to connect Power Apps to external data sources similar to SharePoint, SQL Garçon, or Dynamics 365. This can result in data not being streamlined or recaptured correctly.
Resolution:
Double-check the credentials to ensure that the credentials used to connect to the data source are accurate and have the necessary warrants.
Check network connections to confirm that the network connection is stable and that no firewalls are blocking the connection.
Review data source configuration to ensure that the data source configuration in Power Apps matches the factual configuration of the external data source.
Formula crimes:
Power Apps heavily relies on formulas to perform colorful operations. druggies may encounter formula crimes due to syntax issues, incorrect references, or unsubstantiated functions.
Resolution
Use the Formula Auditing tools Power Apps provides tools to review formulas, helping druggies identify crimes and fix them.
Consult attestation: Microsoft's expansive attestation provides a comprehensive list of supported functions and syntax, helping druggies write accurate formulas.
Tests and remedy Break down complex formulas into lower corridors and test each part independently to identify the specific section causing the error.
Performance Issues
As Power Apps gauges further complexity, druggies may face performance issues similar to slow loading times and sluggish responsiveness.
Resolution
Optimize data queries Limit the quantum of data recaptured by using delegable queries and applying pollutants to reduce the dataset.
Minimize gratuitous controls Remove or optimize gratuitous controls on the app to reduce the cargo on the platform.
influence hiding utensil mechanisms to store constantly used data, reducing the need to cost it constantly.
interpretation comity:
druggies might witness community issues when trying to run Power Apps on different performances or platforms.
Resolution:
Keep Power Apps streamlined Regularly update Power Apps to the latest interpretation to ensure compatibility with the latest features and advancements.
Check the cybersurfer community to confirm that the cybersurfer being used is supported by Power Apps, and clear cybersurfer caches if necessary.
regularize platform performances to ensure that all druggies are running the same interpretation of Power Apps to avoid interpretation conflicts.
warrants and Security:
Security and warrants are pivotal in any operation's development. druggies might encounter issues with penetrating or modifying data due to authorization settings.
Resolution:
Review app warrants Check and configure app-position warrants to ensure druggies have the necessary rights to interact with the app.
corroborated data source warrants Confirm that druggies have applicable warrants for the external data sources used in Power Apps.
Power Platform admin settings: use Power Platform admin settings to manage stoner places and warrants effectively.
Custom Connector Issues:
Power Apps allows druggies to produce custom connectors for integrating with external services. still, issues may arise with the creation, configuration, or perpetration of these custom connectors.
Resolution:
Test custom connectors Completely test custom connectors in Power Apps to identify and resolve any issues before planting them in the product.
Check authentication settings to ensure that authentication settings for custom connectors are rightly configured and necessary API keys or commemoratives are handed in.
Review API attestation related to the attestation of the external service to corroborate that the Power Apps custom connector aligns with the service's conditions.
Mobile Responsiveness:
Power Apps is designed to be mobile-friendly, but druggies may encounter challenges in achieving optimal responsiveness on colorful bias.

Resolution:
use responsive design principles Design Power Apps with responsiveness in mind, considering different screen sizes and exposures.
Test on multiple biases Regularly test the app on colorful bias to identify and address any layout or usability issues.
influence device-specific parcels Use device-specific parcels and functions within Power Apps to enhance the stoner experience on different platforms.
Error Handling:
In complex operations, error-running becomes pivotal. shy error running can make it grueling to diagnose and resolve issues.
Resolution:
apply structured error handling Use Power Apps' error-handling functions and mechanisms to capture and log crimes for analysis.
give meaningful error dispatches and produce clear and descriptive error dispatches to help druggies and directors understand and resolve issues.
Regularly review error logs Cover error logs to identify reproducing issues and apply endless results.
Data Synchronization Issues:

In scripts where multiple drugs are interacting with the same data contemporaneously, conflicts and synchronization issues may arise, leading to data disagreement.

Resolution:

apply auspicious concurrency control Use ways like auspicious concurrency control to manage contemporaneous data updates, icing thickness, and avoiding conflicts.
influence versioning Introduce versioning mechanisms in your data model to track changes, making it easier to identify and resolve synchronization issues.
Enable inspection trails apply inspection trails to log changes and track the history of data variations, easing troubleshooting in case of synchronization problems.

Integration Challenges:

Power Apps frequently integrates with other Microsoft services, and developers may face integration challenges when trying to connect with Microsoft 365, Azure, or other third-party services.

Resolution:

Follow integration stylish practices related to Microsoft's integration stylish practices to ensure flawless connectivity with Microsoft services and external APIs.
Test third-party integrations Completely test integrations with third-party services to identify implicit issues before planting the app in a product terrain.
Check service status Regularly check the service status of integrated platforms to be aware of any ongoing issues that might impact Power Apps' performance.

Limited Offline Functionality:

druggies working in environments with intermittent or no internet connectivity might face challenges as Power Apps primarily rely on a stable internet connection.

Resolution:

use offline capabilities influence Power Apps' offline capabilities to enable druggies to work with the app in offline mode. apply synchronization mechanisms to modernize the data when connectivity is restored.
Plan for offline scripts Design the app with offline scripts in mind, considering how data changes are tracked and accompanied when druggies recapture internet access.
Educate druggies on offline operation and give clear instructions to druggies on how to work with the app in offline mode, including syncing data and resolving conflicts.

Stoner Relinquishment Challenges:

Encountering resistance from druggies who are strange with Power Apps or resistant to change can be a significant chain in the development and deployment process.

Resolution:

Conduct training sessions Organize training sessions to familiarize druggies with Power Apps, showcasing its capabilities and benefits to encourage relinquishment.
produce stoner-friendly interfaces Design intuitive and stoner-friendly interfaces that require minimum training, making it easier for druggies to navigate and interact with the app.
give ongoing support Establish a support system to address stoner queries and issues instantly, fostering a positive experience and encouraging continued operation.

Scaling Issues:

As the operation grows in complexity and stoner base, druggies may encounter challenges related to scalability, affecting performance and responsiveness.

Resolution:

Optimize app architecture Review and optimize the app's armature to ensure it can handle increased loads efficiently.
apply hiding strategies and use hiding mechanisms to reduce the burden on data sources and enhance the app's responsiveness.
Examiner and dissect performance Regularly cover the app's performance criteria and dissect data to identify implicit backups, allowing for visionary optimization.

Licensing and Cost Operation:

Associations may face challenges related to Power Apps licensing, cost operation, and ensuring that the chosen licensing model aligns with the operation and requirements of the druggies.

Resolution

Understand licensing options Gain a thorough understanding of Power Apps empowering options to choose the most applicable plan for your association's conditions.
Examiner operation and costs Regularly cover Power Apps operation and associated costs to ensure alignment with popular constraints and help avoid unanticipated charges.
Explore cost-saving measures and probe implicit cost-saving measures, similar to optimizing data storehouse, to ensure effective application of coffers.
Conclusion
Power Apps is an important tool for businesses producing custom operations without expansive coding. While common issues may arise, understanding the judgments and stylish practices can significantly enhance the development experience. By addressing connectivity, formula, performance, interpretation consistency, warrants, custom connectors, mobile responsiveness, and error handling issues, Power Apps developers can make robust and dependable operations to meet their organizational requirements. Regularly streamlining chops, staying informed about Power Apps updates, and laboriously sharing in the community can further contribute to a successful Power Apps development trip.

entry.title: Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am trying to connect to remote OData service via BTP Destination, it is working fine.

But for every change done in SAP CAP application, it requires the deployment of application to BTP.

So i wanted to test it locally connecting to the Remote OData Service but when i try cds watch --profile hybrid it fails the with this error "Error during request to remote service: Failed to load destination. Caused by: Could not find service binding of type 'destination'."

Requesting guidance how to connect to remote odata service from vs code, which reduces turn around time required for deployment to BTP and will be able test it locally in vs code for the changes carried.

entry.title: Re: July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
Hi there @nsathya_infy 

Indeed you can. There's just a regular old Debian powered x86_64 architecture Linux box (I am fond of saying "the Cloud is just a load of Linux machines" :-)). But one thing you need to know is that HTTP/S access to the outside world is via a proxy, managed by the BAS infrastructure. And while ngrok can work with proxies like this, it's an enterprise-grade feature that is not free. And I have to also say that running ngrok in a Dev Space is probably not allowed, at least not for commercial purposes.

Here's a suggestion, though - if you needed a remote/virtual work space to do these tasks, then you could try GitHub Codespaces. Like BAS Dev Spaces, they're also based on VS Code (Code OSS to be more precise) and you'll have almost exactly the same IDE experience, including a terminal. 

Here's a screenshot of everything you'd need to do - downloading, installing, configuring and starting ngrok, for a locally (in the Codespace) running CAP service. If you clone the northbreeze GitHub repo then you can start a codespace via the green Code button (select the down-arrow for options) and go from there. Good luck!

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud - How to extend Material Master...
entry.content:
Hi Manuel,

This is not possible today.

However, there is a plan (Subject to change - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/288512) to introduce this in future SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition releases (+2025).

The idea will be to provide this added functionality to extend the material master number to up to 40 characters similar to what was provided in S/4HANA on-premise.  The extension will also come with some of the same restrictions included in on-premise.

Hope this helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Initially created an unbound function and was receiving the value correctly. 

But then realized after getting an error via the deployed application that instead of function, an unbound action is expected. 

So changed it to action, but then started getting this error. 

Can anyone please help if they have encountered this or have knowledge on this?

entry.title: Re: Statistical Key Figures Data Posting in KB31N
entry.content: Can we execute KB31N through background Job ? Is there any standard Program for this please.

entry.title: Re: Deleted line item not display in Print preview

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterpris...
entry.content:
c_baker said in a comment in this discussion:

EDCA / Replication Server Heterogeneous Edition are no longer avaialble. See https://me.sap.com/notes/3408368 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2702069

So I guess that answers that.

Ben

entry.title: Re: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content:
I think it is absolutely right, that there is still much room for improvement!

Some small changes can have a positive impact on the usability ... for example, what I requested quite a while ago: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321496 

In a SAP on Prem. system this is not relevant... but it a Cloud product with higher latency it would be quite helpful.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a business rule for recurrin...
entry.content:
When you say "recurring payments" are you referring to recurring Pay Components? If so, we have created such a rule based on the Trigger Workflows scenario and the Compensation Information Model, as shown below:

However, the Trigger Workflows rule scenario does not allow raising a message--only Set statements.

entry.title: How to mass upload Commercial Projects in SAP S4 Public cloud through API?
entry.content: How to upload mass data into SAP S4 Public could for Commercial Projects object through API, and what connection needs to be developed in BODS?

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Rather than me tell you directly, I'll give you a hint.

Functions are called with GET and parameters are sent inside parentheses at the end of the URL. 

Actions, on the other hand, are called with POST and parameters are sent in the payload of the request, usually in JSON.

It most likely didn't help that I confused you into creating a function first, sorry. So - just check how you're making the call to your action. It is likely / possible that you've implemented it correctly - it's just that you're calling it like a function 🙂 

HTH!

entry.title: Re: Signavio SAP Process Manager license clearing
entry.content: Is there any overview what is not activated by default and customer needs to ask for it ?

entry.title: Re: Batch session is not created in SM35 for few FCR runs
entry.content: Hello All, Can you please help me on the above query?

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Both different persons 😊

entry.title: Re: Finding the G/L Account Not Used field
entry.content:
Hi @lamtq

In part, it depends on where you would want to use the model. The “G/L Account Not Used” flag is indeed used in the Implementation Status feature, and it determines whether an account is transported into your production system, so for any model that you’d run in that system, those accounts are already “ignored” as such (not there), so such a flag isn’t necessary. 

For models in your test environment, you can access the needed field via the I_GLAccountInCompanyCode or  I_GLAccountInChartOfAccounts CDS views, depending on the level at which the model should run. 

I hope this answers your question.

Thanks,

Anthony

entry.title: Learning Offline Player
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The customer wishes to enable offline learning. For that, as you know, we need to install the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) in order to execute the Offline Player Installer. 

I’ve asked the IT department there and they confirmed that they don’t install the JRE on their workstations since it is no longer free. They are now asking if the SAP SuccessFactors Learning Offline Player is compatible with OpenJDK. Could anyone please confirm this? If not, could you share with us your suggestions on what to do.

Thank you in advance.

 

 

 

Regards,

Asma CHARIF

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thanks! the new place looks great. Happy to connect, learn and Share.

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content: Actually, I would say changing the Tutorials is a better idea. I have submitted Issues in GitHub pointing that out. Reading the background in the Kubernetes Git Hub of why namespaceSelector uses labels and why they chose to have api server create the kubernetes.io/metadata.name label. It is actually more secure than relying on a user input label. By using kubernetes.io/metadata.name we are guaranteed that is the actual Namespace name, not someone adding a name label impersonating the namespace we actually want.

entry.title: Setting up billing document attachment email settings by Cost Center
entry.content:
SAP S4Hana public cloud standard sends invoices to the project manager after a billing document is completed. I understand this is configured in the output determination settings application.

Billing Document:

Output items:

Email example:

Output determination settings:

We are now looking for the invoice to be sent via email to a particular individual/ group of individuals where the invoice is created out of a specific cost center in SAP S4hana public cloud.

Is there any configuration (manage your solution) or settings (output parameter determination) that we could make use off within SAP. We did check through these options but we could not see where we could set this up for a specific cost center

Please provide possible solutions to achieve the above

#COE,#DE01

entry.title: Identifying Re-packed Handling Units in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is there a way to determine if a particular HU has been re-packed? Currently, I am using the table /SCWM/ORDIM_C and checking if the VLENR (Source HU) and NLENR (Destination HU) are different to conclude that it was re-packed. Please let me know if there is a better method to identify this.

Thanks in advance for your help.

Madhu M V

entry.title: Re: Error while doing a manual Create with Flexible Programming Model
entry.content: I have the same problem, have you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.14
entry.content:
Hi @meganhoy 

 

Nope, that one says same page now found. maybe its a me issue but i can open other help pages and SAP support with my s-user with no issue including SAC roadmap.

entry.title: Re: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the below script:Chart_1 is the source and Table_1 is target

var list=Chart_1.getSelections();
var list1=[""];
for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++)
{
list1[i]=list[i]["Product_3e315003an"];
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Product_3e315003an",list1[i]);    
}

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

Yes, we would change the tutorial.

However, for me, it is also important to not have such configuration drifts between standard and trial clusters as they can lead to such scenarios. This is something we need to take up on the Kyma side.

Thanks,

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Failed to loa...
entry.content:
Please check if you configured remote service correctly from the CAP  side:  https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#connect-and-deploy,

Check your package.json configuration and your model: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#expose-remote-services

Check your CF configuration: There is a nice tutorial regarding remote service here https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-app-ext-service-add-consumption.html#0a5ed8cc-d0fa-4a52-bb56-9c864cd66e71

entry.title: Alternate Resource not appearing in PP/DS PDS in APO
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having issue in transferring the alternate resource from HANA to APO via CIF.

For 1 plant I am able to transfer the alternate resource and can see in PDS but for other I can not.

Please suggest what can be missing here. I checked the data parameter and it looks to be almost identical in both the plants.

Please help.

Regards,

Prabhat

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David, 

My name is Ashley Noah; I am currently a new MBA Graduate and a clinical healthcare professional who is actively seeking to piviot my career into IT. After much research and personal reference from a colleague of mine, I was introduced to the SAP Community and was highly interested on how I could take the necessary steps to become a SAP Certified Consultant. My referall source into SAP recently attended the SAP Sapphire conference in Orlando and was introduced to the Digital Skills Initiative for career changers such as me and thought I'd be a great canidate. I'm writing you today to gain more information about how to participate in this arena as I am highly interested and willing to commit to this program. 

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Ashley Noah

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content: What I mean is I add the file as an attachment

entry.title: Re: Can't access fiori app after deployment
entry.content: Please check if the documentation helps: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/security/authorization
